message:
fix(registry): grant waiters when pending permit is cleaned up

cleanup_region_at and cleanup_task_at only called
try_grant_to_first_waiter for active lease names, not pending-only
names. Waiters queued against pending permits via
register_with_policy(Wait) were stranded on cleanup. Changed to
iterate all removed names. Added 2 regression tests (bd-3tr5n).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
